items.title: "Just over two years ago, Atlanta could have had Stephon Castle, Alex Sarr or Donovan Clingan, among others, with the No. 1 pick. Instead, the Hawks basically used Risacher for matching salary."
items.author: Dan Devine

items.title: Donovan Clingan off limits in trade talks
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: Donovan Clingan off limits in trade talks HoopsHype

items.title: [Robb] The Celtics and Blazers have discussed a trade for Jaylen Brown, though a source says that Deni Avdija would not be on the table in any talks and it would be tough to pry away Donovan Clingan as well. Ultimately, any deal with Portland will likely center around draft capital.
items.author: Pyromania1983
items.body_excerpt: All-Star Deni Avdija would not be on the table in any trade talks, league sources tell MassLive and it would be tough for Boston to pry away Donovan Clingan as well. The Blazers do not have strong center depth behind Clingan with Robert Williams set to hit free agency so trading…
